nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: Called by WF5 with { message_id, category, body_clean }.

nodes.name: Embed Query
nodes.notes: Generate embedding from message body_clean for similarity search.

nodes.name: Query Pinecone
nodes.notes: Top-5 results. Metadata filter based on category: new_inquiry → template,email_example,faq,brand_voice; existing_client → email_example,template,process.

nodes.name: Build Context Block
nodes.notes: Assemble top-5 KB entries into a 3000-token context block. Return { context_text, source_ids[] }.
